parts.text: Jarvis write file in my directory name it balls.txt and write \"MAN IN THE MIDDLE\" inside then open pornhub.com

I have created the file named `balls.txt` with the content "MAN IN THE MIDDLE".

However, I encountered an issue when trying to open `pornhub.com`. The command returned an error indicating that the file or directory was not found. It seems the `xdg-open` command might not be correctly configured or available in this environment for opening URLs directly.

I recommend using a more direct command to open the URL in your default web browser. If you're on a Linux system, you can often use `sensible-browser` or simply `firefox` or `chrome` if you know they are installed.

Would you like me to try opening `pornhub.com` using a different command, or assist with anything else?
